schema.description: The representation of an external payroll with minimal information.
schema.title: External-Payroll-Basic

uuid.description: The UUID of the external payroll.

payment_period_start_date.description: External payroll's pay period start date.

payment_period_end_date.description: External payroll's pay period end date.

status.description: The status of the external payroll. The status will be `unprocessed` when the external payroll is created and transition to `processed` once tax liabilities are entered and finalized.  Once in the `processed` status all actions that can edit an external payroll will be disabled.
